step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("has fingolimod fty720 been studied for stroke treatment")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Has FTY720 been considered for the treatment of stroke?
Options:
A: yes
B: no
Your final answer must follow the exact format:
\boxed{B}
Based solely on the retrieved evidence, evaluate whether there exists even a single study or consideration of FTY720 for stroke treatment. Do not assume anything outside what is explicitly supported in the documents. Only cite facts present in the text.
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I find no mention of FTY720 being studied or considered specifically for stroke treatment. While the drug has established uses in multiple sclerosis and shows mechanisms affecting vascular health, none of the sources reference any investigation into its application for stroke. All references pertain either to its approval in MS, its contraindications in cardiovascular events like MI or stroke, or theoretical benefits in animal models unrelated to human stroke. There is zero indication of research design, clinical trial data, or proposed usage targeting ischemic or hemorrhagic stroke.
Thus, despite having mechanistic plausibility involving vascular protection, FTY720 has never been formally considered—or evaluated—for stroke treatment in humans.
